## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `pnpm run validate` (frontmatter: name matches dir, version + license present)
- [ ] Ran `pnpm test` (skills parse)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) with a `bumps:` block listing each changed skill and its level (`patch` / `minor` / `major`) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No client names, internal URLs, or other non-public references (this is a public repo)
